# DDPM

## Motivation

Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models generate samples by reversing a gradual noising process.

This is following @ho_denoising_2020.
This iss not working right now,,,,,testtt


This shoudl be better...

## Forward Process {#sec-forward}

$$q(x_t|x_{t-1})
=
\mathcal N(
\sqrt{1-\beta_t}x_{t-1},
\beta_t I
)
$${#eq-forward}

...


## VP-SDE

Consider the VP-SDE

$$
d x_t
=
-\frac{1}{2}\beta(t)x_t\,dt
+
\sqrt{\beta(t)}\,dW_t.
$$

Its perturbation kernel is

$$
p(x_t \mid x_0)
=
\mathcal{N}
\!\left(
x_t;
s(t)x_0,
\lambda(t)^2 I
\right),
$$

where

$$
s(t)
=
\exp\!\left(
-\frac{1}{2}
\int_0^t \beta(\tau)\,d\tau
\right),
$$

and

$$
\lambda(t)
=
\sqrt{
1-
\exp\!\left(
-\int_0^t \beta(\tau)\,d\tau
\right)
}.
$$

...

<!-- ## References
::: {#refs}
::: -->
